title: NVIDIA reports record Q1 revenue of $26B, beating estimates
body: NVIDIA reported quarterly revenue of $26 billion, up 262% year-over-year, driven by data center demand for AI chips...

title: 美联储维持利率不变 暗示年内可能降息一次
body: 美联储FOMC议息会议决定维持利率不变,主席鲍威尔在新闻发布会上暗示年内可能降息一次...

title: Tesla recalls 300,000 vehicles over autopilot software bug
body: Tesla announced a software recall affecting 300,000 vehicles due to an autopilot system issue...
